seo.title: Jana Gana Mana Song Lyrics Aayitha Ezhuthu
seo.description: Full Jana Gana Mana songs lyrics, Aayitha Ezhuthu Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Karthik.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Aayitha Ezhuthu, AR Rahman, Karthik, Jana Gana Mana full lyrics, Aayitha Ezhuthu songs lyrics, Jana Gana Mana lyrics snippets, Jana Gana Mana WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Jana Gana Mana lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Jana Gana Mana?

The song is a motivational anthem that inspires youth to pursue their dreams and overcome challenges.

Who composed the music for Aayitha Ezhuthu?

The music for Aayitha Ezhuthu was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

What role does the song play in the movie?

In Aayitha Ezhuthu, the song underscores the film's theme of youthful ambition and societal change.

Who wrote the lyrics for Jana Gana Mana?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

When was Aayitha Ezhuthu released?

The movie was released in the year 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Jana Gana Mana from Aayitha Ezhuthu is a powerful and motivational anthem that captures the spirit of youth and ambition. Sung by Karthik, the song is composed by AR Rahman with lyrics by Vairamuthu, creating an energetic and inspiring atmosphere. It plays a crucial role in the movie by highlighting the themes of change and empowerment. The song encourages listeners to dream big and strive for success, evoking a sense of determination and hope.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the electrifying energy of Jana Gana Mana from the movie Aayitha Ezhuthu. With Karthik's powerful vocals and AR Rahman's dynamic composition, this song is a true anthem of motivation. Dive into the vibrant world of youthful dreams and aspirations with Vairamuthu's inspiring lyrics.
stanzaMeanings: Think of the people, dreams will win, the cause is the support.
Light as the path, mountain as the stage, enemy as the dust, chuck chuck chuck, make noise.
Think of the people, dreams will win, the cause is the support.
Now, let's make a new destiny, oh youth, oh youth.
Let's change fate, let's make a new destiny, oh youth, oh youth.
Think of the people, dreams will win, the cause is the support.
Light as the path, mountain as the stage, enemy as the dust, chuck chuck chuck, make noise.
Take up arms, burn the evil, light the darkness.
Reduce the gap for the poor, establish stability, break the barriers in the fort and the law.
In the wind, nothing is tied, no chains, if a thousand youths dare, no need for weapons.
Oh youth, oh youth, oh youth.
Think of the people, dreams will win, the cause is the support.
Leave fear, touch the goal, leave failure, touch success, friend, fight.
Create your own path like a river in the mountains, lead the army, stop the cycle at the peak of success.
If all good people hide, the rule of foxes will begin, if the youth unite, the world will change.
Oh youth, oh youth, oh youth.
Think of the people, dreams will win, the cause is the support.
Light as the path, mountain as the stage, enemy as the dust, chuck chuck chuck, make noise.
Think of the people, dreams will win, the cause is the support.
Now, let's make a new destiny, oh youth, oh youth.
Let's change fate, let's make a new destiny, oh youth, oh youth.
